sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70502" key="neurorafiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νευρο-ρᾰφικός</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νευρο-ρρᾰφικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n70502.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for shoemending, cobbling,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:154" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.154</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
